name: Simulation
short_description: Try and make as much money as you are able to or grow the biggest community you can, there is so much possibility in here to have fun. Manage them, give them tasks or put them to rest as the community grows bigger in this retro-styled management/simulation game.
detailed_description:
It Really Doesn't Matter !

Check out this really cool new simulation console we got running in here.

You can go and do whatever you feel like with these things, it doesn't matter. That's cool right ?

In this retro-styled simulation "game" manage "people" and try to win as much money as possible.

It is a pretty straightforward gameplay :

- Click on "people" to see how they are doing.

- Buy buildings to give them things to do.

- Click on the buildings to assign "people" to the buildings.

- Read emails to stay in touch with what's happenning.

In other words, you will be able to micro-manage people tasks and health to make them useful for as long as possible
